use_cases: Primary action trigger with customizable visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link)
Form submission and interactive element with disabled state handling
Keyboard-accessible button with focus ring styling for accessibility
Size-adaptable button component for various layout contexts (default, sm, lg, icon)
AsChild composition support for integrating with Radix UI Slot for advanced pattern composition
ai_summary: A versatile button component from the Ruixen UI library using Radix UI's Slot primitive for composition and class-variance-authority for scalable variant management. Supports 6 visual variants and 4 sizes with full accessibility features including focus-visible rings and disabled states. Designed as a foundational atomic component for integration hero pages and general UI systems.
